positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of highly detailed, friendly woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, owls, bears) gathering in a lush forest clearing. The style should be a blend of classic storybook art and modern minimalist vector design, utilizing bold, flat blocks of color and clean, thick outlines. The composition must be central and balanced, making the creatures the main subjects. Focus on strong silhouettes and exaggerated, charming poses. Lighting should be bright, cheerful daylight, creating high contrast against stylized foliage. Color palette: emerald greens, sapphire blues, warm terracotta oranges, and muted creams. The overall mood is cozy, magical, and joyful. Perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, lowres, watermark, logo, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, messy composition, hyperrealistic, grayscale, dirty, noisy
